channel.title: Posts on Saikat Kumar Dey
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Saikat Kumar Dey

item.title: School of Rock
item.description: Jack Black - what a performance! It’s one of the most fun movies I’ve ever watched. It’s hilarious. It’s inspirational. There’s a very important lesson to be learnt from it. Jack Black is a failed rock-musician who fakes being a substitute teacher at a local school because he wanted to have enough money to pay his rent. He was looking to create his own band but no one took him seriously.
